# Murugappan M — Full Stack Engineer

> Full-Stack Engineer with 3+ years building cloud-native, event-driven B2B SaaS in regulated domains (LLM-powered CLM, healthcare). TypeScript across the stack — React frontends to event-driven Node.js services on AWS. Founding engineer on a product scaled to $300k ARR; strong focus on distributed systems, observability, and security/compliance (SOC 2, HIPAA).

## Experience
- MedMe Health — Intermediate Software Engineer (L4.5), Dec 2025–present (event-driven RPA platform; OpenTelemetry observability; HIPAA compliance; LLM-based extraction)
- HyperVerge — SDE 2 / SDE 1 / SDE Intern, 2022–2025 (founding engineer on HyperStart CLM, scaled to $300k ARR; AWS SQS/EventBridge job system; LLM contract-metadata pipeline; VAPT/SOC 2)
- Samsung R&D Institute India — R&D Intern (Isolation Forest anomaly detection)

## Skills
TypeScript, Python, SQL; React.js, Node.js, Nest.js, Express.js; event-driven architecture (AWS SQS, EventBridge), microservices, REST APIs; AWS (Lambda, API Gateway, EC2, S3, VPC), Terraform, Docker, GitHub Actions; OpenTelemetry, Grafana, Playwright; SOC 2, VAPT, PHI/PII scrubbing.

## Education
Kumaraguru College of Technology — B.E. Computer Science (2019–2023)

## Open source
- AnkiDroid (11k+ stars) — 3 merged PRs: clipboard image paste, deprecation-API wrapper, test-configuration improvements.
